title: Salty Crispy Japanese Dum Stir-fry
description: A unique take on the traditional Japanese dum dish with a twist of cinnamon to complement the salty and crispy texture.

ingredients.name: Paleo-friendly dum
ingredients.notes: Available in most health food stores or specialty stores

ingredients.name: Palm sugar
ingredients.notes: Substitute with honey or maple syrup for non-paleo version

instructions: Place the Paleo-friendly dum on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Sprinkle cinnamon over the dum evenly, making sure all pieces are coated.
Drizzle palm sugar or honey mixture evenly on top of each dum and mix well using your fingers to distribute it properly.
Bake for 10 minutes until caramelized and golden brown. Rotate the pan halfway during baking for even cooking.
After removing from oven, sprinkle sesame seeds over the dum for added crunchiness.
